/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -Dcimg_use_jpeg=1 -O3 -g -ggdb -g -ggdb -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -lomp CMakeFiles/sta.dir/app/Main.cc.o -o app/sta  app/libOpenSTA.a /opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk@8/lib/libtcl8.6.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
